lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Did you ever get to talk to those ratcatchers I told you about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, they were... interesting...

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Well, my dear. Is there anything I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any more kittens?

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Indeed I have. They are 100 coins each, do you want one?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Okay then, here you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I've paid that boy enough already.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm quite fussy over cats - can I pick my own?

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Well okay, but they're all just as cuddly as each other.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oops, looks like I'm a bit short. I'll have to come back later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be off. See you another time.

sections.title: While owning a cat with 100 rodent kills but without a cat training medal

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again Gertrude!

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Well, hello adventurer! How are you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: My cat has caught 100 rats!

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Well well! You are good with cats! I'd give you a little present if you had space to take it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's very kind of you - I'll come back again when I've got more space.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Well well! You are good with cats!

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Here, I have a little present for you...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, thanks Gertrude.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: I'll want 100 coins for a kitten.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Aren't you still raising that other kitten? Only once it's fully grown and it no longer needs your attention will I let you have another kitten.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Oh, I do love my precious little kittens! Perhaps you could care for one, some day!

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Well done.
